commands.summary: RealtimeEventAllocator tests passed for capacity, overflow, release/reuse, graph-start allocation guard, and cacheline alignment static_asserts.

tests_covered: Capacity-bound allocation succeeds for fixed slots
Overflow returns null and increments overflow_count
Dynamic allocation guard rejects after graph start
RealtimeEventSlot cacheline alignment and size static_asserts compile
allowed_operations_checked: Fixed-size slots and free-stack allocation contract added
forbidden_operations_checked: No dynamic allocation allowed after graph start by debug guard
No unbounded retry or blocking path
No false-sharing-prone layout without static evidence
